arrington-jodey.text: Jodey Arrington (Republican) is the current officeholder running for U.S. Representative, TX-19.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show Jodey Arrington had raised $1,680,094 and spent $1,837,094 for this campaign.

On 7-Jan-2025, Jodey Arrington voted Yea on H R 29. A Yea vote required federal detention of unauthorized immigrants charged with theft, burglary, larceny, or assaulting a law enforcement officer, and let state attorneys general sue the federal government over certain immigration enforcement decisions.

rable-kyle.text: Kyle Rable (Democratic) is a candidate for U.S. Representative, TX-19.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show Kyle Rable had raised $21,086 and spent $12,557 for this campaign.
No public voting record in our set for Kyle Rable (not currently a member of Congress).

base.summary: This is the U.S. House race for TX-19. In the most recent election (2024-11-05), Jodey Arrington (REP) won by about 61.38 points out of 265875 votes cast. The bullets below summarize each current candidate's public finance and voting-record data where available.
base.caveats: This summary only includes facts found in our sourced dataset (FEC finance filings and U.S. House Clerk roll-call votes). It omits anything we could not verify from those sources. No public data in our set on any candidate's policy positions for this race (the positions field was empty for every candidate as of this build). No public data in our set on Jodey Arrington's policy positions. No public data in our set on Kyle Rable's policy positions.
